name: slopstop
description: Marketplace hosting the `slopstop` plugin: per-ticket tracking files for Linear / JIRA tickets, with start/pause/update/archive slash commands.

plugins.name: slopstop
plugins.description: Per-ticket tracking for Linear / JIRA tickets, with deep planning, PR creation, and ship-it commands. Eight slash commands — /slopstop:start, :plan, :update, :pause, :archive, :pr, :merge, and :doc-sync — keep a durable per-ticket plan + findings + progress log outside the repo; investigate the codebase and produce a parallelism-aware plan with optional subagent fanout in git worktrees; open a PR with a pre-commit simplify pass, project tests, and CodeRabbit review polling; wrap merge-PR + advance-one-workflow-state (NOT auto-Done — review/QA gates are respected) + archive into one confirmed step; and mirror design/ to the repo wiki or Linear Docs via :doc-sync.
